_comment: Bot 账户到人类操作者的映射 | Mapping from bot accounts to their human operators. 当工作流中需要 @mention 某个用户时，如果该用户是 Bot，则会 @mention 对应的人类操作者。未在此列出的 Bot 将回退到仓库所有者。| When a workflow needs to @mention a user, if that user is a Bot, the corresponding human operator will be @mentioned instead. Bots not listed here will fall back to the repository owner.
